9:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Quick Reference"}]
a:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"What changed"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"User action"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"New PyPI release"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory"}]," + restart Hermes"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Source-only fix"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"git pull"}]," + restart Hermes"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"New dependency / entry point"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"git pull"}]," + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install -e ."}]," + restart Hermes"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"externally-managed-environment"}]," (Debian/Ubuntu)"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Use a venv or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install --break-system-packages"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"SQLite schema changed"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["See ",["$","a",null,{"href":"#how-to-confirm-schema-changes","children":"How to confirm schema changes"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"E6 TripleStore split (v2.8)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Auto-migrates on first init. Backup at ",["$","code",null,{"children":"{db}.pre_e6_backup"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"MEMORIA architecture (v3.0)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Auto-creates 5 new tables on first init. No manual action needed"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"plugin.yaml"}]," / tool schema"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Restart Hermes only"}]]}]]}]]}]
b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"PEP 668: externally-managed-environment on Debian / Ubuntu"}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":["Debian 13 (and Ubuntu 24.04+) ship Python with PEP 668 protection. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install"}]," outside a virtualenv fails with:"]}]
d:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"error: externally-managed-environment\n× This environment is externally managed\n"}]}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Solution 1: Use a virtualenv (recommended)"}]}]
f:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"python3 -m venv ~/mnemosyne-venv\nsource ~/mnemosyne-venv/bin/activate\npip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory","language":"bash"}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":"Make sure Hermes is configured to use this venv's Python."}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Solution 2: pipx (for CLI tools)"}]}]
12:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install pipx\npipx install mnemosyne-memory\n"}]}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Solution 3: Override (quick fix, use with caution)"}]}]
14:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory --break-system-packages","language":"bash"}]
15:["$","p",null,{"children":"This bypasses the guard. Fine for personal machines or containers. Not recommended for shared/multi-app systems."}]
16:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Upgrading from v2.7 to v3.0"}]
17:["$","p",null,{"children":"This is the most common jump for existing users. It covers 3 releases worth of changes. Read the relevant sections in order:"}]
18:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"v2.7 → v2.8"}]," — E6 TripleStore split (schema migration)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"v2.8 → v2.9"}]," — MCP SDK 1.x compatibility (code only)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"v2.9 → v3.0"}]," — MEMORIA architecture (new tables)"]}],"\n"]}]
19:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Step-by-step"}]
1a:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"# 1. Update the package\npip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory\n\n# (If PEP 668 blocks you, use --break-system-packages)\n# pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory --break-system-packages\n\n# 2. Restart Hermes to load the new plugin/tools\nhermes gateway restart\n\n# 3. Verify\nhermes mnemosyne version\n# Should show: 3.0.0\n\nhermes mnemosyne stats --global\n# Check memory count is preserved\n\nhermes tools list | grep mnemosyne\n# Should show 17+ tools","language":"bash"}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"What happens to your data on first run:"}]}]
1c:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["v2.7 databases get auto-migrated by E6 on first BeamMemory init. Backup written to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"{db}.pre_e6_backup"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["v3.0 creates 5 new MEMORIA tables (",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_facts"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_timelines"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_instructions"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_preferences"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_kg"}],") via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS"}],". Existing tables are untouched."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"All existing memories, triples, embeddings remain intact."}],"\n"]}]
1d:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"If anything goes wrong:"}]}]
1e:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"# Restore pre-E6 backup\ncp ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db.pre_e6_backup  ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db\n\n# Roll back to v2.7\npip install 'mnemosyne-memory==2.7.0'\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
1f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Upgrading to v3.1 (Shared Surface & Multilingual MEMORIA)"}]
20:["$","p",null,{"children":"The v3.1 release adds shared surface memory, multilingual MEMORIA, custom embedding endpoints, and many fixes."}]
21:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"New capabilities"}]
22:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Shared surface memory."}]," Cross-agent shared persistence via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_shared_*"}]," tools. Each agent gets an isolated shared surface. Activate with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes memory surface"}]," commands."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Multilingual MEMORIA."}]," Language auto-detection for German, Russian, and Chinese. Extraction applies language-specific patterns based on detected input language."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Custom embedding endpoints."}]," Configure any OpenAI-compatible embedding provider via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"OPENROUTER_BASE_URL"}]," (set to your own server URL). Jina model dimensions auto-detected."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["Deterministic ",["$","code",null,{"children":"get(id)"}],"."]}]," Direct memory retrieval by ID — no vector search, no ranking. Call ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne.get(memory_id)"}]," for exact lookup."]}],"\n"]}]
23:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"New environment variables"}]
24:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"What it does"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"OPENROUTER_BASE_URL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"https://openrouter.ai/api/v1"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Override the embedding API provider URL"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDINGS_VIA_API"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"not set"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Set to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"true"}]," to route all embedding models through the API"]}]]}]]}]]}]
25:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"What to verify after update"}]
26:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory\nhermes gateway restart\n\n# Verify version\npython3 -c \"from mnemosyne import __version__; print(__version__)\"\n# Expected: 3.1.2","language":"bash"}]
27:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Rollback"}]
28:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"pip install 'mnemosyne-memory==3.0.0'\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
29:["$","p",null,{"children":"Shared surface tables remain in the database but are ignored by v3.0.0."}]
2a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Upgrading to v3.1.1 / v3.1.2 (Patch Releases)"}]
2b:["$","p",null,{"children":"These are additive patch releases — no schema changes, no manual steps."}]
2c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"v3.1.1"}]
2d:["$","p",null,{"children":["Renames embedding env vars to the preferred convention (",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_URL"}]," / ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_KEY"}],"). The old names (",["$","code",null,{"children":"OPENROUTER_BASE_URL"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"OPENROUTER_API_KEY"}],") still work as fallbacks."]}]
2e:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
2f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"v3.1.2"}]
30:["$","p",null,{"children":["Strict fact matching is now the default. If you relied on permissive matching (where any query word matched any stored fact), set ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LENIENT_FACT_MATCH=1"}]," to opt back in."]}]
31:["$","p",null,{"children":"Other fixes: entity prefix similarity now requires 30% min length ratio, single-token strict fact queries (5+ chars, non-stopword) now match instead of being silently rejected."}]
32:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"# Upgrade\npip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory\nhermes gateway restart\n\n# If recall results seem too narrow after upgrade:\nexport MNEMOSYNE_LENIENT_FACT_MATCH=1\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
33:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Schema Migrations"}]
34:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses automatic schema migrations that run on first connection after upgrade. There is no manual ",["$","code",null,{"children":"migrate"}]," command."]}]
35:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Version"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Migration"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"1.0 → 2.0"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Schema upgrade"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Add BEAM tiered memory, FTS5 indices"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"2.0 → 2.1"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Schema upgrade"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Add ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]," to episodic"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"2.1 → 2.2"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Schema upgrade"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Add temporal graph indexes"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"2.2 → 2.8 (E6)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"e6_triplestore_split"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Split ",["$","code",null,{"children":"triples"}]," into ",["$","code",null,{"children":"triples"}]," + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"annotations"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"2.8 → 3.0 (MEMORIA)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Auto-create"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["5 new tables (",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_facts"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_timelines"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_instructions"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_preferences"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_kg"}],")"]}]]}]]}]]}]
36:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L83",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Automatic Migrations"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses automatic schema migrations that run on first connection after an upgrade. There is no ",["$","code",null,{"children":"python -m mnemosyne.migrate"}]," command. If migration fails, enable debug logging with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"logging.getLogger(\"mnemosyne\").setLevel(logging.DEBUG)"}],"."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
37:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Cross-Instance Migration"}]
38:["$","p",null,{"children":"Export from old instance, import to new using the Python SDK:"}]
39:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\n# Export from old database\nold_mem = Mnemosyne(db_path=\"old.db\")\nold_mem.export_to_file(\"export.json\")\n\n# Import into new database\nnew_mem = Mnemosyne(db_path=\"new.db\")\nnew_mem.import_from_file(\"export.json\")\n\n# Verify\nprint(new_mem.stats())","language":"python"}]
3a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"How to Confirm Schema Changes"}]
3b:["$","p",null,{"children":"Wondering if an update changed the SQLite schema? Here's how to check."}]
3c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Before updating (baseline)"}]
3d:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"# Dump the current schema\npython3 -c \"\nimport sqlite3, pathlib\ndb = pathlib.Path.home() / '.hermes' / 'mnemosyne' / 'data' / 'mnemosyne.db'\nconn = sqlite3.connect(str(db))\nschema = conn.execute(\"SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\").fetchall()\nfor row in schema:\n  print(row[0] + ';')\nconn.close()\n\" > ~/mnemosyne_schema_baseline.txt","language":"bash"}]
3e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"After updating (compare)"}]
3f:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"# Dump the new schema\npython3 -c \"\nimport sqlite3, pathlib\ndb = pathlib.Path.home() / '.hermes' / 'mnemosyne' / 'data' / 'mnemosyne.db'\nconn = sqlite3.connect(str(db))\nschema = conn.execute(\"SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\").fetchall()\nfor row in schema:\n  print(row[0] + ';')\nconn.close()\n\" > ~/mnemosyne_schema_new.txt\n\n# Compare\ndiff ~/mnemosyne_schema_baseline.txt ~/mnemosyne_schema_new.txt","language":"bash"}]
40:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Quick check: what version was my DB created by?"}]
41:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"python3 -c \"\nimport sqlite3, pathlib\ndb = pathlib.Path.home() / '.hermes' / 'mnemosyne' / 'data' / 'mnemosyne.db'\nconn = sqlite3.connect(str(db))\ntables = conn.execute(\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\").fetchall()\nnames = [t[0] for t in tables]\nif 'memoria_facts' in names:\n  print('DB schema: v3.0+ (MEMORIA)')\nelif 'annotations' in names:\n  print('DB schema: v2.8+ (E6 TripleStore split)')\nelif 'episodic_memory' in names:\n  print('DB schema: v2.0+ (BEAM)')\nelse:\n  print('DB schema: v1.x (legacy)')\nconn.close()\n\"","language":"bash"}]
42:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"By Install Path"}]
43:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"PyPI (recommended for users)"}]
44:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
45:["$","p",null,{"children":"To verify the new version:"}]
46:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"hermes mnemosyne version\nhermes mnemosyne stats --global\nhermes memory status","language":"bash"}]
47:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":["Source install (",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install -e ."}],")"]}]
48:["$","p",null,{"children":["For most updates, only ",["$","code",null,{"children":"git pull"}]," is required:"]}]
49:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"cd mnemosyne\ngit pull\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
4a:["$","p",null,{"children":["Re-run ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install -e ."}]," only when ",["$","code",null,{"children":"setup.py"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pyproject.toml"}]," added new dependencies, new entry points, or metadata changed."]}]
4b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Hermes MemoryProvider only"}]
4c:["$","p",null,{"children":["This path symlinks ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/plugins/mnemosyne"}]," directly into the repo:"]}]
4d:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"cd mnemosyne\ngit pull\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
4e:["$","p",null,{"children":["No ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install"}]," needed."]}]
4f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Database Migrations"}]
50:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","code",null,{"children":"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS"}],", so most schema changes upgrade automatically."]}]
51:["$","p",null,{"children":"Run a migration script only when:"}]
52:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"The CHANGELOG explicitly mentions a database schema change"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You are upgrading from a pre-2.0 version"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You see errors about missing columns or tables"}],"\n"]}]
53:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Available migration scripts"}]
54:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Script"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"What it does"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"scripts/migrate_from_legacy.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Migrates from v1.x ephemeral databases to the canonical v2+ path. Idempotent."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"scripts/migrate_triplestore_split.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Manual E6 migration (v2.8). Only needed if you set ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_MIGRATE=0"}],". Idempotent."]}]]}]]}]]}]
55:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"E6 TripleStore Split"}]
56:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory\nhermes gateway restart\n# Check logs for:\n#   \"E6: auto-migrated N annotation rows from triples -> annotations.\"","language":"bash"}]
57:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Manual migration (explicit control):"}]}]
58:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"export MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_MIGRATE=0\nhermes gateway restart\n\n# Preview\npython scripts/migrate_triplestore_split.py --dry-run\n\n# Apply\npython scripts/migrate_triplestore_split.py","language":"bash"}]
59:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"What to verify after E6 migration:"}]}]
5a:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"# Check annotations table exists\npython3 -c \"\nimport sqlite3, pathlib\ndb = pathlib.Path.home() / '.hermes' / 'mnemosyne' / 'data' / 'mnemosyne.db'\nconn = sqlite3.connect(str(db))\ncount = conn.execute('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM annotations').fetchone()[0]\nprint(f'Annotations table has {count} rows')\nconn.close()\n\"","language":"bash"}]
5b:["$","p",null,{"children":"All migration scripts are idempotent — safe to run multiple times."}]
5c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Rollback"}]
5d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Roll back to a specific version"}]
5e:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"# Pin to a known good version\npip install 'mnemosyne-memory==2.7.0'\n\n# Or from source\ncd mnemosyne\ngit checkout v2.7.0\npip install -e .\n\n# Restart Hermes\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
5f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Restore a database backup"}]
60:["$","p",null,{"children":"If you have a DB backup from before the update:"}]
61:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"# E6 auto-backup\ncp ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db.pre_e6_backup  ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db\n\n# Or any custom backup\ncp ~/backups/mnemosyne_20260101.db  ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db","language":"bash"}]
62:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Export, nuke, re-import"}]
63:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"# Export current data\nhermes mnemosyne export --output ~/backup.json\n\n# Delete the database entirely\nrm ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db\n\n# Start fresh with old version\npip install 'mnemosyne-memory==2.7.0'\nhermes gateway restart\n\n# Re-import\nhermes mnemosyne import --input ~/backup.json","language":"bash"}]
64:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Verifying an Update"}]
65:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"# Version check\nhermes mnemosyne version\n\n# Stats (memories preserved?)\nhermes mnemosyne stats --global\n\n# Tools registered?\nhermes tools list | grep mnemosyne\n\n# Memory available?\nhermes memory status\n\n# Schema version (for the curious)\npython3 -c \"\nimport sqlite3, pathlib\ndb = pathlib.Path.home() / '.hermes' / 'mnemosyne' / 'data' / 'mnemosyne.db'\nconn = sqlite3.connect(str(db))\ntables = conn.execute(\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\").fetchall()\nprint(f'{len(tables)} tables: {[t[0] for t in tables]}')\nconn.close()\n\"","language":"bash"}]
66:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Troubleshooting"}]
67:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"\"Command not found\" after update"}]
68:["$","p",null,{"children":"Entry points are registered at install time, not at runtime. Re-run the install:"}]
69:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"pip install -e .","language":"bash"}]
6a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"\"No module named mnemosyne\" after update"}]
6b:["$","p",null,{"children":"Your virtual environment may have been deactivated or the editable install broke. Re-install:"}]
6c:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"pip install -e .","language":"bash"}]
6d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Plugin changes not taking effect"}]
6e:["$","p",null,{"children":"Hermes caches plugins at startup. You must restart:"}]
6f:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"hermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
70:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"\"externally-managed-environment\" errors"}]
71:["$","p",null,{"children":["You're on Debian 13+ / Ubuntu 24.04+ (PEP 668). See the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"#pep-668-externally-managed-environment-on-debian--ubuntu","children":"PEP 668 section"}],"."]}]
72:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Database errors after schema change"}]
73:["$","p",null,{"children":"If you see errors about missing columns or tables:"}]
74:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"# Try auto-repair by restarting\nhermes gateway restart\n\n# If that fails, run the legacy migration\npython scripts/migrate_from_legacy.py\n\n# If errors persist, export, delete, re-import\nhermes mnemosyne export --output ~/backup.json\nrm ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db\nhermes mnemosyne import --input ~/backup.json","language":"bash"}]
75:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Memory count dropped after update"}]
76:["$","p",null,{"children":["The E6 migration moves annotation rows from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"triples"}]," to a new ",["$","code",null,{"children":"annotations"}]," table. This does not delete memories."]}]
77:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"hermes mnemosyne stats --global\n\n# Check E6 migration log\ngrep -i \"auto-migrated|E6\" ~/.hermes/logs/gateway.log","language":"bash"}]
78:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Legacy Migration (v1.x)"}]
79:["$","p",null,{"children":"For migrating from pre-2.0 data formats:"}]
7a:["$","$L82",null,{"code":"python scripts/migrate_from_legacy.py --db mnemosyne.db","language":"bash"}]
7b:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L83",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Breaking Changes"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Major version upgrades (2.x → 3.x) include breaking changes. Always read the changelog and test in staging before production deployment."}]}]]}]]}]}]

8b:[["$","title","0",{"children":"Documentation | Mnemosyne Docs"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"description","content":"Comprehensive documentation for Mnemosyne — the native memory system for AI agents with persistent, structured memory."}],["$","link","2",{"rel":"author","href":"https://github.com/axdsan"}],["$","meta","3",{"name":"author","content":"Abdias Moya"}],["$","link","4",{"rel":"manifest","href":"/site.webmanifest","crossOrigin":"$undefined"}],["$","meta","5",{"name":"keywords","content":"AI memory,agent memory,persistent memory,BEAM,Mnemosyne,SQLite,vector search,Hermes plugin"}],["$","meta","6",{"name":"robots","content":"index, follow"}],["$","link","7",{"rel":"canonical","href":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site"}],["$","meta","8",{"property":"og:title","content":"Mnemosyne Documentation"}],["$","meta","9",{"property":"og:description","content":"Comprehensive documentation for Mnemosyne — the native memory system for AI agents."}],["$","meta","10",{"property":"og:url","content":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site"}],["$","meta","11",{"property":"og:locale","content":"en_US"}],["$","meta","12",{"property":"og:type","content":"article"}],["$","meta","13",{"name":"twitter:card","content":"summary_large_image"}],["$","meta","14",{"name":"twitter:title","content":"Mnemosyne Documentation"}],["$","meta","15",{"name":"twitter:description","content":"Comprehensive documentation for Mnemosyne — the native memory system for AI agents."}],["$","link","16",{"rel":"icon","href":"/favicon.ico?favicon.09c3lv69~x6ir.ico","sizes":"16x16","type":"image/x-icon"}],["$","link","17",{"rel":"icon","href":"/icon.png?icon.0kmz_gfrh-z2~.png","sizes":"32x32","type":"image/png"}],["$","link","18",{"rel":"apple-touch-icon","href":"/apple-icon.png?apple-icon.07me1vioavolz.png","sizes":"180x180","type":"image/png"}],["$","$L8d","19",{}]]
